headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Cancer Alliance Adds Weight To Valuation Debate
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) announced a new multi year cancer immunotherapy partnership with Oxford BioTherapeutics. The collaboration focuses on developing novel T cell engager therapies for solid tumors using Oxford BioTherapeutics' proprietary platform. The agreement is structured as a multi year R&D alliance aimed at expanding Bristol Myers Squibb's oncology pipeline. Bristol Myers Squibb is a global biopharmaceutical company with a long standing focus on oncology and immunology,...
